code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [CloudNative_Serverless] --> CLOSED

    state CLOSED {CloudNative_DockerImage] --> Normal
        Normal --> IncrementFailures: execute_trade fails
        IncrementFailures --> CheckThreshold: failure_count++
        CheckThreshold --> Normal: count < 3
        CheckThreshold --> [CloudNative_DockerImage]: count >= 3

        Normal --> ResetCount: execute_trade succeeds
        ResetCount --> Normal: failure_count = 0
    }

    CLOSED --> OPEN: Threshold Reached 3 failures

    state OPEN {CloudNative_DockerImage] --> BlockCalls
        BlockCalls --> CheckTimeout: All calls raise CircuitBreakerError
        CheckTimeout --> BlockCalls: elapsed < 60s
        CheckTimeout --> [CloudNative_DockerImage]: elapsed >= 60s
    }

    OPEN --> HALF_OPEN: Recovery Timeout Expired

    state HALF_OPEN {CloudNative_HelmChart] --> TestRecovery
        TestRecovery --> EvaluateResult: Allow ONE test call
        EvaluateResult --> [CloudNative_HelmChart]: Success
        EvaluateResult --> ReOpen: Failure

        ReOpen --> [CloudNative_ServiceMesh]
    }

    HALF_OPEN --> CLOSED: Test Call Succeeds
    HALF_OPEN --> OPEN: Test Call Fails

    style CLOSED fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#2E7D32,color:#fff
    style OPEN fill:#F44336,stroke:#C62828,color:#fff
    style HALF_OPEN fill:#FFC107,stroke:#F57C00,color:#333
repo_description: Finance feedback engine is an automated portfolio simulation tool using the LLM models of your choice.
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个熔断器的状态图，核心有三个状态：CLOSED、OPEN和HALF_OPEN。从CloudNative_Serverless进入CLOSED状态开始。
明白，CLOSED是正常服务状态对吧？那内部需要细化什么逻辑吗？比如失败计数之类的？
对，CLOSED里面要包含Normal、IncrementFailures、CheckThreshold和ResetCount这几个子状态。执行交易失败时走IncrementFailures，成功时走ResetCount清零。CheckThreshold判断失败次数，小于3次回Normal，等于3次就要跳出到OPEN状态。
好的，CLOSED内部的子状态画好了。OPEN状态我理解为熔断开启，所有调用都被阻断？
没错，OPEN里面放BlockCalls和CheckTimeout。所有调用抛出CircuitBreakerError，CheckTimeout检查是否满60秒，满了就进入HALF_OPEN尝试恢复，没满继续阻断。
HALF_OPEN是半开状态，只放一个测试调用？成功和失败分别怎么走？
HALF_OPEN里用TestRecovery和EvaluateResult。允许一次测试调用，成功就回到CLOSED，失败的话要走到ReOpen，然后进入CloudNative_ServiceMesh。另外注意HALF_OPEN的入口关联CloudNative_HelmChart。
确认一下：CLOSED绿色、OPEN红色、HALF_OPEN黄色，这样状态区分比较直观。还有需要调整的吗？
等等，CLOSED和OPEN内部的CloudNative_DockerImage节点，你画的是方括号结尾，应该是圆括号。另外HALF_OPEN到CLOSED、HALF_OPEN到OPEN的转移条件也要补上，分别是测试调用成功和失败。
已修正，括号都改成圆括号了，HALF_OPEN的两个出向转移也加上了。现在整个熔断器状态流转应该完整了。
